articles.author: Natalie Allison
articles.title: Trump to headline Great American State Fair after music acts cancel - The Washington Post
articles.description: Trump's advisers are quickly working to organize a rally after news that more than half the performers slated for the Great American State Fair concert series to be held this summer on the National Mall are dropping out.
articles.content: President Donald Trump will headline an opening ceremony for the Great American State Fair on the National Mall next month after many of the musical performers slated for the event canceled, citing t… [+31 chars]
